title: The Telephone Always Rings Twice
original_title: Le téléphone sonne toujours deux fois
overview: Marc Elbichon, a novice private sleuth, is investigating a wave of assassinations bearing a particular characteristic: the perpetrator, dubbed the "telephone killer" always strangles his female victims with a telephone cord.

trailers.title: Le Téléphone sonne toujours deux fois !! (1985) - Bande-annonce
